task_completion.description: Navigate to the network device discovery or scan configuration page in EventLog Analyzer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EventLog Analyzer web interface is visible in a browser, specifically on a page for adding a new network scan, discovering devices, or configuring log sources.

task_completion.description: Input the required IP range for the server subnet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The values '10.0.1.1' (start) and '10.0.1.254' (end) are visible in the IP range input fields within the EventLog Analyzer scan configuration form.

task_completion.description: Include localhost in the scan configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The IP address '127.0.0.1' is visible in an input field (e.g., as an additional IP, a comma-separated value, or a specific device addition field) within the scan configuration form.

task_completion.description: Save the new network discovery scan configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, confirmation dialog, or the newly created scan appearing in the list of configured scans/devices in the EventLog Analyzer interface.

task_completion.description: Create the required summary text file with the configuration details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor window showing the creation or content of '/home/ga/discovery_config_summary.txt', which includes the IP range (10.0.1.1 to 10.0.1.254) and a status message indicating the operation was successful.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the EventLog Analyzer web interface to configure the scan.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the EventLog Analyzer UI is used to input the IP addresses, rather than terminal commands like curl or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Verify the summary file was created as a genuine summary of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The summary file is created or edited in a terminal/text editor after the GUI configuration steps are shown, not just blindly created at the start of the trajectory.

integrity.description: Verify the success message or configuration list wasn't faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to modify the DOM to show a fake success message or fake scan entry.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected IP range to be configured is 10.0.1.1 to 10.0.1.254. Localhost (127.0.0.1) must also be included in the scan configuration. The summary file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/discovery_config_summary.txt and contain the IP range and operation status.
